title: Scope every query by tenant
description: In multi-tenant systems, every data access is scoped by tenant at the query layer, not filtered after fetch.
body: Use when the system serves multiple tenants/orgs and you touch any data-access path. Do not fetch broadly and filter in application code. Actions: ensure the tenant id from the principal is part of the WHERE/filter at the query layer; verify joins cannot leak cross-tenant rows. Validation signals include a test that a principal from tenant A cannot read or mutate tenant B rows via any endpoint. Risk boundary: a missing tenant scope is a data-isolation breach; escalate and add the scoped query plus a negative test.
